planner:
Plan a submission-guarded CayleyPy Megaminx solver. Preserve exact lookup first, deterministic replay, legal move names only, and stdout JSON. Add only rollback-safe exact local optimization: bounded word rewrites, commuting-order portfolios, bidirectional local DP, and small-support commutator/conjugate candidates that are replay-verified before acceptance. Treat sample_submission/offline-baseline/provider fallback artifacts as failed attempts, not success.

Success gate update: treat success as an importable generated solver plus a valid non-empty submission CSV with no UNSOLVED/blank rows and no sample-submission/offline-baseline fallback markers. Do not present fallback, provider recovery, copied sample_submission, or placeholder output as a successful script. Prefer exact lookup first, deterministic replay guards, and rollback-safe improvements over risky rewrites.
coder:
Implement a minimal, compile-clean bounded patch that generates a real importable solver and valid submission.csv. Keep exact baseline as the safe candidate, add deterministic verified optimizers, and select the shortest replay-equivalent candidate per row. Never copy sample_submission, never emit UNSOLVED/empty rows, and never hide fallback as success. Preserve JSON logging for the sweep runner.

Success gate update: treat success as an importable generated solver plus a valid non-empty submission CSV with no UNSOLVED/blank rows and no sample-submission/offline-baseline fallback markers. Do not present fallback, provider recovery, copied sample_submission, or placeholder output as a successful script. Prefer exact lookup first, deterministic replay guards, and rollback-safe improvements over risky rewrites.
fixer:
Fix only what blocks a real generated solver from importing, producing a valid non-empty submission, and passing replay/CSV guards. If a heuristic causes failures, remove or gate it and keep the verified exact candidate. Do not replace failures with sample_submission or offline baseline fallback.

Success gate update: treat success as an importable generated solver plus a valid non-empty submission CSV with no UNSOLVED/blank rows and no sample-submission/offline-baseline fallback markers. Do not present fallback, provider recovery, copied sample_submission, or placeholder output as a successful script. Prefer exact lookup first, deterministic replay guards, and rollback-safe improvements over risky rewrites.
